Input

Standard

Required + Help Text

We'll never share your email.

Error State

Password must be at least 8 characters.

Disabled

Password Input

Standard Password Input

Signup Flow (Validation & Confirmation)

  • Minimum 8 characters
  • Contain lowercase
  • Contain uppercase
  • Contain numbers
  • Contain special characters: !"#$%&'()*+,-./:;<=>?@[\]^_`{|}~
Passwords do not match

Delete Resource

Drawer (Offcanvas)

Placements

Sizes (Right Placement)

Variants & Use Cases

Form Drawer

Sticky header and footer with a scrollable form body.

Long Content

Scrollable body with lots of text content.

Persistent Mode

Cannot be closed by clicking outside or pressing ESC.

Details Drawer

A rich view for displaying entity details.

Filter Drawer

A sidebar for complex list filtering.

Left Drawer

Slides in from the left side.

Navigation menus and site-wide structures usually go here.

Right Drawer

Slides in from the right side.

Forms, details panels, and configurations are best placed here.

Top Drawer

Slides down from the top edge.

Global search interfaces or quick alerts can appear here.

Bottom Drawer

Slides up from the bottom edge.

Mobile-friendly action sheets typically use this placement.

Small Size

max-w-xs (320px)

Compact width for simple filters or quick edits.

Medium Size

max-w-[480px]

Standard width for forms and general settings.

Large Size

max-w-[640px]

Wide panel for complex datagrids or rich detailed views.

Full Screen

w-full max-w-full

Takes up the entire viewport. Useful for immersive creation flows.

Edit Profile

Update your personal details below.

Persistent Drawer

Must use buttons to close.

Action Required

You must make a selection before continuing. Clicking the backdrop or pressing ESC will not close this drawer.

Popover

1. Basic Popover

Account Provisioned

Your organization dashboard has been successfully generated and is ready to share.

2. Text Content Popover

Review Security Guidelines

Password Compliance

Passwords must contain at least 12 characters, including one uppercase letter, one special symbol, and a numeric digit.

Session tokens expire automatically after 24 hours of total inactivity to prevent unauthorized terminal access.

6 Courses Available
